changes: Rewrote entire SKILL.md from Chinese to English for better devstral-small comprehension
Added bundled Python scripts for batch rename and directory analysis tasks
Added critical rule: save output files to current directory, not inside analyzed directory
Added critical rule: write tool content must be a string, not an object
Fixed kebab-case regex to preserve dots in filenames (e.g., v3.1 stays v3.1, not v3-1)
Added worked examples table for kebab-case conversion edge cases
Added explicit depth counting rule (root directory = depth 1)
Removed generic/redundant content (utility tool installation, safety reminders, Chinese text)
Reduced skill from 342 lines of generic content to ~120 lines of focused, procedural guidance
